text:
X-send-pr-version: 3.113
 X-GNATS-Notify:
 
 
  >Submitter-Id:	current-users
  >Originator:	Rene Ladan (rene1 at #bsdports/#bsddocs)
  >Organization:
  >Confidential:	no
  >Synopsis:	[maintainer-update] update astro/boinc-setiathome-enhanced 6.03, add astropulse client	
  >Severity:	non-critical
  >Priority:	low
  >Category:	ports
  >Class:		maintainer-update
  >Release:	FreeBSD 7.1-RC2 amd64
  >Environment:
 System: FreeBSD self.rene-ladan.nl 7.1-RC2 FreeBSD 7.1-RC2 #0: Tue Dec 23 14:27:36 CET 2008 root@self.rene-ladan.nl:/usr/obj/usr/src-71/sys/RENE amd64
 
 astro/boinc-setiathome-enhanced version 5.27_3
 net/boinc-client version 6.2.14
  >Description:
 Update the astro/boinc-setiathome-enhanced port.
 
 Update the setiathome client to version 6.03, add an astropulse client at
 version 5.00.  Also add the gratitious screen savers (see below).
 
 The setiathome client is runtime tested and produces valid results (i.e. I
 receive credits for my setiathome workunits).  The astropulse client has been
 runtime tested in so far that it doesn't crash; unfortunately the supply of live
 units is very low at the moment.
 
 The port is also compile-time tested on an 8.0-CURRENT i386 system.
 
 Add an advice to UPDATING to finish existing workunits first.
 
 Adapt the net/boinc-client port to add the following files in
 ${LOCALBASE}/include/BOINC :
 - graphics_api.h
 - graphics_data.h
 - boinc_gl.h
 These files are needed to compile the new version.  Due to the design of the
 astropulse client the --disable-graphics configure switch doesn't work anymore
 (some state info is wrapped into a graphics structure).  This makes it necessary
 to *always* compile the screen savers, so install them as well.  The upstream
 authors seem to be too busy to resolve this, despite some initial patches which
 I've sent in.
  >How-To-Repeat:
  >Fix:
 Apply the patches at ftp://rene-ladan.nl/pub/freebsd/ :
    - UPDATING.diff (SIZE=640 MD5=f92519d1437cccd0e5ea63bf4a4d7689)
    - boinc-client.diff (SIZE=1381 MD5=c4a915eab11423ebdc23c44d7dc05ceb)
    - boinc-setiathome-enhaced.diff (SIZE=12543 MD5=bd19c82690d12d8e19217eb79fd9e25b)
